core_principle.statement: Color tokens are a machine-readable representation of the architectural engineering color system.
core_principle.interpretation: All visual systems (UI, web, print, motion) must consume colors through structured tokens, not raw hex values.

token_architecture.structure_logic: Engineering Layer → Architectural Layer → Accent Layer
token_architecture.usage_rule: No direct hex usage in production systems

engineering_layer_tokens.description: Structural backbone tokens used for typography, UI structure, and system hierarchy

architectural_layer_tokens.description: Spatial system tokens used for backgrounds, layout structure, and architectural surfaces

accent_layer_tokens.description: Authority and transformation token used for CTA, highlights, and system transition points

usage_rules.rule_1: No raw hex usage in UI or codebase
usage_rules.rule_2: All colors must be referenced via semantic tokens
usage_rules.rule_3: Accent tokens must remain under 10% visual dominance

scalability_rules.theme_support: Supports light and dark system extension
scalability_rules.consistency_rule: Same token mapping must be used across all platforms

user_perception: This is a system-driven engineering brand
There is no decorative randomness here

strategic_goal.objective: Ensure all digital and visual systems are driven by structured color logic
strategic_goal.outcome: Unified, scalable, engineering-grade brand identity system
